title: Using typescript for monday apps development
excerpt:
I want to use typescript in the development of my Monday app. Is there support for types in monday-sdk-js library? 
Is there any template for creating Monday apps with typescript and react.js?

posts.author: canbax (yusuf canbaz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to use typescript in the development of my Monday app. Is there support for types in monday-sdk-js library?

Is there any template for creating Monday apps with typescript and react.js?

posts.author: TMNXT-Dev (Ilja Zweigert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hwy @canbax,

since TypeScript is a JavaScript dialect you can use the Quickstart guides.

Greetings

posts.author: canbax (yusuf canbaz)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. I just generated a new app with a typescript template at create-react-app. I can just use that by enabling any types. It works.

posts.author: TMNXT-Dev (Ilja Zweigert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey absolutly no problem

Happy it worked for you!

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
@canbax glad that worked!! And thank you @TMNXT-Dev for chiming in, you’re awesome

If we can help with anything else please let us know.

-Daniel

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
